title: cyperus rigens subsp. cephalanthus
intro: Cyperus rigens subsp. cephalanthus, also known as the Papyrus Sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus rigens subsp. cephalanthus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
